items.title: Unlimited OCR parses full documents
items.oneliner: Open repo for one-shot OCR that handles long, complex document layouts without chunking pages into smaller regions.

items.title: Run GLM-5.2 locally today
items.oneliner: Hands-on guide for running and quantizing GLM-5.2 locally, with hardware targets and setup steps for real machines.

items.title: Shumai replaces Frame.io workflows
items.oneliner: Open-source review platform with S3 storage, frame annotations, secure sharing, and distributed transcoding for media teams.

items.title: Oak rethinks version control
items.oneliner: Git alternative built for agent workflows, with branching, revision history, and collaboration features non-developers can actually use.

items.title: Benchmark bug-finding models yourself
items.oneliner: Practical benchmark suite for testing whether security models can reproduce and verify real bugs found by Mythos.

items.title: Assembly web server on Linux
items.oneliner: Pure ARM64 assembly web server using syscalls only, serving static files and CGI without libc.

items.title: Build a Pi Zero camera
items.oneliner: Cloneable hardware project with build guide for a Pi Zero camera featuring autofocus, filters, GIF capture, and hotspot transfer.

items.title: Plotnine brings ggplot to Python
items.oneliner: Python visualization library that gives R-style grammar-of-graphics plotting for fast exploratory charts and publication-ready figures.

items.title: Understand the new HTTP QUERY
items.oneliner: Concrete walkthrough of RFC 10008 showing when QUERY beats GET or POST for complex API filtering.

items.title: Shrink GIFs with exhaustive search
items.oneliner: Deep compression walkthrough showing how exhaustive DEFLATE search can cut legacy GIF sizes without losing a pixel.
